resources.string: Iontráil do théacs / Enter your text
Aistriúchán go Béarla / Translation to English
✓ Níl aon earráidí gramadaí! (No grammar errors found)
Cuir isteach téacs Gaeilge ar dtús. / Please enter some Irish text first.
Earráid líonra. / Network error. Please check your connection and try again.\n\nDetails: %1$s
Theip ar an aistriúchán. / Translation failed. Please try again.\n\nDetails: %1$s
